en-US: Fallback export flow is now more reliable when rewarded ads fail, with better tour coordination and trial consumption only after successful output.
ar: Tatbiq masar fallback lil tasdir asbaha akthar istiqraran inda fashal iilan rewarded, maa tansiq afdal maa al-tour wa istihlak al-try baad natijah najihah faqat.
de-DE: Der Fallback Export Ablauf ist jetzt zuverlaessiger bei Rewarded Ad Fehlern, mit besserer Tour Abstimmung und Verbrauch des Testexports nur nach erfolgreicher Ausgabe.
es-419: El flujo de exportacion fallback ahora es mas confiable cuando falla el anuncio rewarded, con mejor coordinacion del tour y consumo de prueba solo tras salida exitosa.
fr-FR: Le flux d export fallback est maintenant plus fiable quand une pub rewarded echoue, avec une meilleure coordination du tour et une consommation d essai seulement apres une sortie reussie.
hi-IN: Rewarded ad fail hone par fallback export flow ab zyada reliable hai, tour coordination behtar hai, aur trial sirf successful output ke baad consume hota hai.
it-IT: Il flusso export fallback ora e piu affidabile quando la rewarded ad fallisce, con migliore coordinamento del tour e consumo prova solo dopo output riuscito.
ja-JP: Rewarded ad no shippai ji ni fallback export flow ga yori antei. Tour no kyouchou ga kaizen sare, trial wa seikou shita output no ato dake shouhi saremasu.
ko-KR: Rewarded ad silpae si fallback export flow ga deo anjeongjeogimnida. Tour yeondong i gaeseon doeeotgo, trial eun seonggong output ihueman sojidoemnida.
pt-BR: O fluxo de exportacao fallback agora esta mais confiavel quando o anuncio rewarded falha, com melhor coordenacao do tour e consumo de teste so apos saida bem sucedida.
ru-RU: Fallback eksport teper nadezhnee pri sboye rewarded ads, s luchshei koordinatsiei tour i rashodom proby tolko posle uspeshnogo vyvoda.
zh-CN: Dang rewarded ad shibai shi, fallback export flow geng wending. Tour xietong geng hao, qie trial zhizai chenggong output hou xiaofei.
zh-TW: Dang rewarded ad shibai shi, fallback export flow geng wending. Tour xietong geng hao, qie trial zhizai chenggong output hou xiaofei.
